items.title: Report multiple metrics per k
items.avoid: Publishing only inertia or only silhouette for a single k without context.
items.prefer: Table or plot of inertia, mean silhouette, and per-cluster silhouette for k in a sensible range.
items.why: Single numbers hide local failures and monotonic inertia bias.
items.example: For k=2..8, log `inertia_`, `silhouette_score`, and min per-cluster silhouette in an experiment tracker.

items.title: Match preprocessing between fit and evaluate
items.avoid: Fitting on scaled X but computing silhouette on raw features.
items.prefer: Persist the scaler with the model; evaluate on identically transformed data.
items.why: Metric geometry must mirror clustering geometry or scores are meaningless.

items.title: Check stability before deploying segments
items.avoid: Accepting the first k-means seed because silhouette looks acceptable once.
items.prefer: Compare partitions across multiple seeds or bootstrap samples; flag low agreement.
items.why: Unstable clusters change membership under small perturbations—risky for production rules.
items.example: Twenty seeds at k=4: if pairwise ARI between runs spans 0.4–0.95, investigate preprocessing or k before launch.

items.title: Separate tuning labels from benchmark labels
items.avoid: Grid-searching k to maximize ARI on the same labeled set you report.
items.prefer: Choose k with internal metrics; evaluate external scores on held-out labeled data.
items.why: Prevents optimistic bias analogous to test-set leakage in supervised learning.
items.example: Pick k via silhouette on unlabeled 80%; report ARI only on labeled 20% never used for k selection.
